metadata.description: Vendor-neutral, multi-project Claude Code agent framework. One shared core plus opt-in domain packs; per-project flavor comes from each consumer's project.json overlay.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Vendor-neutral agent-development core: generic agents, skills, commands, hooks, and the project-aware agent-work CLI.

plugins.name: uav-pack
plugins.description: UAV/drone domain pack: MAVLink-style telemetry, mission planning, embedded/edge runtime.

plugins.name: iot-pack
plugins.description: IoT domain pack: BLE communication, device telemetry, health-metrics processing.

plugins.name: web-pack
plugins.description: Web/marketing domain pack: SEO, i18n, landing-page CRO, Figma-to-code styling.

plugins.name: infra-pack
plugins.description: Infrastructure & delivery domain pack: Kubernetes/Helm, GitOps promotion, IaC, GitLab CI, GCP CI auth, Keycloak. Opt-in; requires core.

plugins.name: lsp-pack
plugins.description: Semantic code-navigation pack: Serena LSP MCP server. Opt-in; requires the serena binary (uv) on the machine.
